name: Dak's Whole Grain Oat Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Better for Bread white flour
1/2 cup Quaker multi-grain 100% Natural hot cereal
2 Egg whites or 1 egg or 1/4 Egg substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the machine's browning control to light.
2. Put all the ingredients into the pan in the order listed, select "Oat/French" and push "Start."
